approach: Split the universal-plugin plugin capability into two verbs along the dev/release axis (#84 thesis: pinning belongs to release, not build). build DERIVES the dev-consumable form (vendor manifests) and NO LONGER resolves version pins -- the registry-pinning step LEAVES build. bundle MATERIALIZES the release artifact: scans the plugin's skills for npx <cli>@<version> references and rewrites each WORKSPACE package's pin to the version in its local packages/<pkg>/package.json (not the registry -- registry resolution is off-by-one at cs version time, the crux of #84), applying a doc-example ignore so a skill whose version strings are illustration (upgrade-universal-plugin) is never rewritten; an external (non-workspace) pin like gherkin-cli is left untouched.

STRUCTURAL: narrow plugin/build/ (delete the Pin-resolution scenarios + pin flags --registry/--range/--package/--allow-major/--skip-pins from the frozen build.feature) -> Clearance floor (weakening acceptance scenarios) PRE-AUTHORIZED by the user in-session this run. New plugin/bundle/ node (bundle.feature) inherits the pin machinery via the RegistryClient DIP seam (a WorkspaceVersionSource). Root spec.md capability map (+bundle) + placement map FLIPS (pins -> bundle, not build).

IN SCOPE this CR: the two-verb mechanism + workspace resolution + doc-example ignore. OUT of scope (sibling CRs): the builder AUTOMATION (run build on edit + pre-commit guard/dev-local invocation form) and the root package.json version-script wiring (changeset version && bundle && git add). De-placeholder prose in cyberlegion legate/manage-inbox = separate content change.
auto-spec: self-assert the spec gate within leash after cold sdd-spec-judge PASS; user ratifies in-session. Clearance pre-authorized; Conflict/Compatibility floors still stop.

why: build/bundle split along the dev-vs-release axis (#84). NARROWED plugin/build/ -- pin resolution removed from build (build derives vendor manifests only, no network, no pins); deleted the Pin-resolution scenarios + --registry/--range/--package/--allow-major/--skip-pins flags from the frozen build.feature. NEW plugin/bundle/ -- release-time materializer: pins each WORKSPACE package's npx <cli>@<version> to its local packages/<pkg>/package.json version (workspace-only, offline; fixes #84 off-by-one at changeset version time), skips doc-example (pin-exempt) skills and external (non-workspace) pins. Root spec.md capability/placement/concept maps updated (pins flip build->bundle; new release concept). cold sdd-spec-judge 3-lens {oracle,builder,architect} ALIGNED true, all PASS round 1; check-spec-state OK, check-suite OK (boolean), 0 open markers; one non-blocking coverage gap (missing-manifest precondition) closed with a mirror scenario pre-freeze. Clearance floor (build narrowing) PRE-AUTHORIZED by user in-session; Compatibility n/a (impl unbuilt); Conflict none. build.feature re-opened for narrowing then re-frozen; bundle.feature newly frozen.
